ocr_findings.description: The table has 5 organizational forms in column 1 and only 2 executive titles (CEO, CIO) in column 2. Image shows rows (3)(4)(5) in column 2 are intentionally blank. OCR correctly renders them as empty cells — format preserved.
Illustration image (org chart with 経営者, 国内事業部, 海外事業部 hierarchy) and mascot/decorative images rendered as placeholders; no text content lost

reviewer_notes: 経営組織 (Lesson 01-04) content page. All headings, body paragraphs, table structure, and 学習のポイント box text faithfully reproduced. Chapter sidebar label 第1章 企業活動 is present in the image margin but not captured in OCR — low impact as it is navigational metadata only.
